About Me ——

ASHRAF
HOSSAIN

I'm a freelance graphic designer specializing in YouTube thumbnails and podcast cover art. With a passion for bold visuals and scroll-stopping design, I help creators grow their audience through powerful imagery.

Based in Bangladesh, I work with clients globally — delivering premium designs fast, with unlimited revisions until you're 100% satisfied. Every thumbnail is crafted with strategy: hook, emotion, and click-worthiness built in.

YouTube Thumbnails Podcast Covers Adobe Photoshop Canva Pro Brand Identity Social Media Art Channel Branding Fast Turnaround

Got Questions?

FREQUENTLY ASKED
QUESTIONS

On average I deliver within 24–48 hours depending on the complexity. For bulk orders or rush requests, just let me know and we'll arrange something that works.

Share your podcast or channel name, the episode topic or title, any reference images or styles you like, and a preferred color palette if you have one. The more detail you give, the better the result.

I offer revisions until you're happy. My goal is to deliver exactly what you envisioned. Note that revisions don't include a complete redesign from scratch — but I'll always work with you until it's right.

Absolutely — this is actually my preferred way of working. If you publish regularly, a monthly retainer means consistent, on-brand visuals every time without the back-and-forth. Reach out and we'll put together a custom plan.

You'll receive high-resolution PNG/JPG optimised for YouTube, Spotify, Apple Podcasts, or wherever you need it. Source files (PSD/AI) are available on request.

Of course! Reach out via email or WhatsApp and I'll share my full portfolio. You can also check my Fiverr profile for additional reviews and design samples.
